title: Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate
Apply now
Request info
The Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate is an interdisciplinary program offered by the
Bouvé College of Health Sciences
and Khoury College that prepares you for success in a range of health informatics fields. Courses also apply toward a master’s degree, so you’ll be well on your way if you decide to continue your education.
Explore program requirements in the course catalog
Program details
Flexible program options
Flexible program options
The Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate is designed to offer flexibility, with online or in-person options and faster or slower schedules to accommodate other commitments. We make it a priority to help you reach your goals in ways that work for you.
Advance your career
Advance your career
A graduate certificate in Health Informatics Management and Exchange offers you the knowledge to support the collection, management, retrieval, and exchange of electronic health data. This can open up career opportunities in the rapidly evolving health care and information technology fields, including:
Intern at Solid Biosciences
Specialist in data management
Health database design
Campus location
Boston
Located in the heart of Boston, Northeastern’s oldest campus is home to a vibrant community of students, researchers, and faculty working across disciplines to build a better world through CS.
Explore Boston's campus
Applications and admissions
How to apply
How to apply
To apply for admission, submit an online application.
Apply now
Program costs
Program costs
Visit Student Financial Services for tuition and fee information, and to find tools and calculators to help you estimate what your program might cost.
Visit Student Financial Services

Request information
Complete this form to learn more about the Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate. One of our enrollment counselors will contact you soon.

Meet our faculty
Get to know the engaged, experienced professors who are here to support you every step of the way.
View all faculty
Jay Spitulnik
Jay Spitulnik is an associate teaching professor at Khoury College, and the director of the Health Informatics graduate program. He brings a Ph.D. in Organizational Psychology and 10 years of project management experience in the healthcare industry to questions of project management technology, organizational behavior, and statistics in patient care.
Read bio
Break into tech without a computer science background
If you are looking to get into a tech field without computer science or data science experience, then the Align MS in Computer Science or Align MS in Data Science might be for you.
Learn about the Align program
Visit Bouvé College of Health Sciences
The Health Informatics Management and Exchange Graduate Certificate is an interdisciplinary collaboration with Bouvé College of Health Sciences.
Learn about Bouvé College of Health Sciences

Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate
The Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate will introduce you to the basic principles of securing computer and information systems — laying the groundwork for a promising cybersecurity career.
